# Failure-transparent positioning

## When to use

Use for skeptical technical buyers.

## Why it works

Admitting limits builds credibility.

## Mechanism

Specific constraints make claims more believable.

## Required inputs

Not-for page, limitations, alternatives.

## When not to use

If it undermines core value.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Engaged sessions, high-fit conversions.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
